notes: Runs perfectly if you have a save AFTER the intro movie (which is, to be honest, too long and pretty useless). The game only crashes if you launch a new game, so I'm guessing the movie is the culprit here.
title: BELOW

notes:
I installed Media Foundation workarounds (search github and the like) but they still didn't solve the intro video crashing the game.  I noticed that as the loading animation started to fade, I could hit escape at around that moment and select Skip Cutscene, and this allowed me to play the game.

As others have mentioned, it works after you have a saved game to where it's not a "New Game".

I am not sure how to share with others a fresh save game, otherwise I would.  

I am also not positive if the MF workaround was necessary to get to the "Skip Cutscene" menu option.

After this workaround, the game works well!  Zero issues so far.

I hope this helps someone.
